title: coord-mcp planning gate — stdio MCP begin_planning/end_planning, per-repo TTL+heartbeat mutex, read-bundle

tests.summary: 12 passed (lookback, A-grants/B-waits/A-releases/B-inherits, repo-scoping, TTL auto-release, heartbeat refuses expired, partial-read contended, expired-release guard, intent->conflict->digest)

liveTransport.cmd: stdio MCP JSON-RPC A/B/A/B sequence via server.mjs (2 sessions, shared GARRISON_HOME)
liveTransport.summary: A GRANTED -> B WAIT(holder A) -> A RELEASED -> B GRANTED + readBundle.releasedPlan = A's plan

roundtrip.cmd: setup.sh register stdio MCP -> verify.sh ok -> register-mcp remove (clean)
roundtrip.summary: coord-mcp registered in ~/.claude.json, verify ok, clean remove

codexReview.note: r1 heartbeat-resurrection -> r2 free-path TOCTOU -> r3 partial-read -> r4 unlink-after-takeover -> r5 approve (each finding fixed+tested)

codexPwTest.note: stdio MCP server — correctness gate is the committed vitest suite + the live JSON-RPC transport sequence

video.note: asciinema of the PLAN-GATE A/B/A/B sequence over the real stdio MCP transport; prints PLAN-GATE OK
